topK.label: Top K Results
topK.help: Number of memories to inject per turn (default: 10)

minSimilarity.label: Minimum Similarity
minSimilarity.help: Minimum cosine similarity threshold for memory retrieval (0.0–1.0, default: 0.3)

excludeAgents.label: Excluded Agents
excludeAgents.help: Agent IDs to exclude from memory injection/ingestion (comma-separated glob patterns)

ingestOnOutput.label: Ingest on Output
ingestOnOutput.help: Automatically extract and store memories from agent responses (default: true)

ingestOnCompaction.label: Ingest on Compaction
ingestOnCompaction.help: Ingest conversation content when LCM compacts it (default: true)

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.help: Optional API key for supermemory server authentication

contextLabel.label: Context Label
contextLabel.help: Header label for injected memory context (default: 'Agent Memory')

maxContextTokens.label: Max Context Tokens
maxContextTokens.help: Approximate token budget for injected memories (default: 2000)
